name: Play-Doh Kitchen Creations Magical Mixer Playset
description:
Create amazing pretend cakes, cupcakes, and cookies with the Play-Doh Kitchen Creations Magical Mixer Playset! Aspiring pastry chefs can pretend to bake up a storm by placing 1 of the 2 Play-Doh treat mold trays into the removable bowl, filling each mold with Play-Doh modeling compound, and simply pulling the handle to stamp kooky cookies and crazy cake shapes! Add swirly pretend frosting with the extruder or spatula tools, form make-believe sprinkles with the holes in the spatula’s handle, and create even more Play-Doh candies, toppings, and decorations with the half-molds on the side of the toy mixer. This Play-Doh kitchen playset includes 10 ounces of non-toxic modeling compound in assorted colors, and makes a fun arts and crafts activity or gift for kids 3 years and up who love cooking toys and play food. Back to school season is here! These preschool toys make the perfect back to school gifts for kids! A must have addition to your classroom's supplies and educational learning toys!

Hasbro, Play-Doh, and all related properties are trademarks of Hasbro.

Includes stand mixer playset with removable bowl, 1 extruder, 1 spatula accessory, 2 tray molds, and 5 cans Play-Doh Brand Modeling Compound (net weight 10 oz/283 g).

Ages 3 years and up
Not intended to be eaten.
Notice to Parents: Contains Wheat.
Non-Toxic. Conforms to: ASTM D-4236.
To clean, allow to dry, then scrape or vacuum.
Molded results vary depending on child’s age and level of skill.
Product and colors will vary.
